texto: ...patriarchy, hierarchy, and capitalism create, encourage, maintain, and perpetuate addiction and dependency. Patriarchy and hierarchy are based on domination and subordination, which result in fear. This fear is expressed by the dominators through control and violence, and in subordinated people through passivity and repression of anger. The external conflict of hierarchy between dominants and subordinates becomes internalized in individuals, creating personal inner chaos, anxiety and duality. To quell the inner conflict people resort to addictive substances and behavior.
explicacao: Citação de Charlotte Davis Kasl sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “...patriarchy, hierarchy, and capitalism create, encourage, maintain, and perpetuate addiction an…” articula coragem, addiction, patriarchy em registro de coragem, com relevância para contextos como termino e patriarchy.
